response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio phonetically matches the provided lyrics for '青い空に' and 'My Soul, Your Beats!'. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized for both songs. Manual transcription was used for mid-song vocal ad-libs and bridging sections. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps are precisely anchored to the onset of vocalizations. Aggressive truncation was applied during the upbeat chorus of '青い空に' to prevent cascading delays, and instantaneous transitions were used where phrases flowed without a breath.

subtitles.original: もう何十回も何百回も
subtitles.english: Tens of times, hundreds of times...

subtitles.original: 澄む空見上げてたどり着いた場所が
subtitles.english: I looked up at the clear sky and the place I reached
is the diamond of my dreams.
Thousands of times, tens of thousands of times,
to you who shed so many tears.

subtitles.original: ねえ 諦められたことはあったけど
subtitles.english: Hey, there were times I felt like giving up, but...

subtitles.original: 憧れは限界だったかな
subtitles.english: Was my admiration at its limit?
I don't need it anymore.

subtitles.original: そこにただ待つなんて
subtitles.english: Just waiting there...
would be such a waste, right?
Our respective stories...
at the moment they intersect,
you who watches over them...

subtitles.original: 放つ夢だけ 大きな声出して
subtitles.english: Let out a big voice for the dreams you release,
and the sparkling light that seems to burst.
Without ever fading away,
no matter how far,

subtitles.original: 世界に向こうに届けてよ
subtitles.english: deliver them to the other side of the world.
An endless...
impulse within this chest,

subtitles.original: どうしても どうしても 僕を呼んでいたから
subtitles.english: because no matter what, no matter what, it was calling out to me.
Toward what lies ahead,
I'll keep on running,
to the next, and the next.
Hey!
The half-hearted lies...
clutching that helplessness,

subtitles.original: 立ち尽くしていたあの日を 雨はプレリュード
subtitles.english: standing still that day—the rain was a prelude.
Thousands of times, tens of thousands of times,
to you who kept on challenging.

subtitles.original: ねえ 聞かせてよ 夢はこんなんだったって
subtitles.english: Hey, tell me... the dream was supposed to be like this.
If giving up were easy,
then it definitely wouldn't exist.
No matter who tries to stop us,
don't hesitate.
All of that passion,
keep it connected without dropping it,
yes, until the very end.

subtitles.original: プライドに誓い 星を羽ばたいて
subtitles.english: Vowing on our pride, taking flight to the stars,

subtitles.original: 鳴り止まないファンファーレ
subtitles.english: an unceasing fanfare.
Always here,
it has been flowing.

subtitles.original: 遠い未来へ 祈るように
subtitles.english: Toward the distant future, like a prayer.
I can't forget
the regrets of those days either.

subtitles.original: 追いかけて 追いかけて 滑り込んだ この想い
subtitles.english: Chasing, chasing, and sliding in with these feelings,

subtitles.original: 青い空に ふと溢れてた
subtitles.english: they suddenly overflowed into the blue sky,
far, far away.

subtitles.original: 目覚めては繰り返す 眠い朝は
subtitles.english: Waking up and repeating the cycle, to a sleepy morning

subtitles.original: 襟のタイをきつく締め
subtitles.english: I tighten the tie around my neck

subtitles.original: 教室のドアくぐるとほんの少し 胸を張って歩き出せる
subtitles.english: When I pass through the classroom door, I can walk in with my chest puffed out proudly

subtitles.original: そんな日常に吹き抜ける風
subtitles.english: Such a wind blows past everyday life
I thought I heard it
I even thought I felt it
Now it starts to shake within my chest
I thought it would come soon

subtitles.original: 幾億の星が消え去ってくのを
subtitles.english: As those millions of stars vanished
I watched them fade
I waved them good-bye
I'm glad
